hero_desc: Find top-rated barbers in seconds, or list your salon and let our software manage your schedule 24/7.
cf_title: Your Freshest Cut, Just 3 Taps Away.
cf_desc: Download the app and discover the easiest booking experience in Iraq.
cf_1_desc: See live availability and book instantly. No calls, no queues — just tap and go.
cf_2_desc: Know you're getting a great cut from top-rated professionals trusted by your community.
cf_3_desc: Get automatic push notifications and reminders so you never miss an appointment.
pf_title: Fill Your Chairs. End the Phone Calls.
pf_desc: Powerful tools to automate your shop and grow your clientele.
pf_1_desc: Prevent double-booking with real-time sync. Every slot, every barber — perfectly managed in one dashboard.
pf_2_desc: Set custom schedules, working hours, and service menus for every staff member in your shop.
pf_3_desc: Automated SMS reminders keep your chairs full and your revenue safe. Never lose a customer again.
pr_desc: Choose the plan that fits your business. Contact us on WhatsApp to subscribe.
ts_1_quote: Easiest way to get a haircut! I just open the app, pick my barber, and I'm done. No more waiting for an hour.
ts_2_quote: KurdCut doubled my walk-ins! The calendar system saved us so much time and we never double-book anymore.
faq_users_a1: Yes! The KurdCut app is completely free for customers. Download it, create an account, and start booking instantly.
faq_users_q2: How do I book an appointment?
faq_users_a2: Open the app, search for barbers or salons near you, pick a time slot, and send a booking request. You'll get a confirmation right away.
faq_users_a3: Absolutely. You can cancel or reschedule directly in the app. We recommend doing so at least 2 hours before your appointment.
faq_users_a4: We're live in Erbil, Sulaimani, and Duhok, with more cities launching soon across Iraq.
faq_partners_q1: How do I list my shop?
faq_partners_a1: Contact us! We'll set up your account and guide you through the process.
faq_partners_q2: How do I pay for my subscription?
faq_partners_a2: Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange payment. We currently handle subscriptions manually to give you personal support.
faq_partners_q3: Can I manage multiple staff members?
faq_partners_a3: Yes! The Pro Salon plan supports up to 5 staff members with individual schedules and service menus.
faq_partners_a4: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans so you can test every feature risk-free.
dl_desc: Available on iOS and Android. Start booking your next grooming experience today.
ft_cta_desc: Join hundreds of businesses already thriving on KurdCut.
ft_slogan: The premium booking standard for Iraq.
privacy_p1: Welcome to KurdCut. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our KurdCut platform (the "Service").
privacy_h1_intro: We collect the following types of information to provide and improve our Service:
privacy_h1_li1: Phone Numbers: Used exclusively for user authentication via One-Time Password (OTP) login and essential communication.
privacy_h1_li2: Location Data: Collected to help you discover and book nearby barbers, salons, and nail centers.
privacy_h1_li3: Appointment History: Records of your past and upcoming bookings to display in your profile.
privacy_h2_intro: The information we collect is strictly utilized for the following core operations:
privacy_h2_li1: Facilitating Bookings: Connecting users with service providers and managing the reservation calendar.
privacy_h2_li2: Automated Reminders: Sending automated SMS notifications to remind you of upcoming appointments.
privacy_h2_li3: Preventing No-Shows: Maintaining a reliable ecosystem for partners by tracking attendance and reducing no-show rates.
privacy_h3_p: We implement robust security measures to protect your data. We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Your booking details are shared with our Business Partners (e.g., the specific salon you book with) only to the extent necessary to fulfill your appointment.
privacy_h4_p: If you have any questions or concerns regarding your privacy or this policy, please contact us at:
terms_p1: Welcome to KurdCut! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the KurdCut platform (App and Website). By registering or using our platform in any capacity, you agree to comply with these Terms.
terms_h1_intro: KurdCut operates as a two-sided marketplace designed to connect users seeking grooming services with business owners, including barbers, salons, and nail centers ("Business Partners") operating within Iraq.
terms_h1_li1: User Accounts & Registration: To use certain features of the platform, you are required to register an account using a valid phone number. Access is secured via a One-Time Password (OTP) verification process. You agree to provide accurate information and are accountable for any activity performed under your account.
terms_h1_li2: Booking Commitments: By reserving an appointment, you commit to arriving on time. You must manage your bookings responsibly.
terms_h1_li3: Cancellations: If you need to cancel or reschedule, you are expected to do so well in advance.
terms_h2_intro: As a user booking appointments, you agree to the following rules:
terms_h2_li1: Penalties: Repeated missed appointments (no-shows) or excessive late cancellations harm our Business Partners and may result in the temporary or permanent suspension of your KurdCut account.
terms_h2_li2: Location Permissions: To accurately recommend services nearby, we require access to your location data. You may revoke this access at any time via your device settings, though it may limit core platform functionality.
terms_h2_li3: Subscriptions: You must purchase and maintain an active subscription plan to list your business on the platform, utilize the staff calendar management tools, and receive direct user bookings. Failure to pay subscription fees may result in your profile being hidden or suspended.
terms_h2_li4: Accuracy of Information: Business names, service prices, staff availability, and locations listed must remain honest, accurate, and up to date at all times.
terms_h3_p: As a Business Partner providing services on KurdCut, you agree to:
terms_h4_p: We reserve the right to modify these Terms or the features of our service at any time. Significant changes will be communicated to users directly.
terms_h5_p: For any inquiries related to these Terms of Service, please reach out to us:
sub_intro: Join the premium booking platform and let technology manage your appointments, staff, and growth — while you focus on what you do best.
sub_b1_desc: Our intelligent calendar system handles bookings, prevents double-booking, and sends automatic reminders to your customers.
sub_b2_desc: Track revenue, customer trends, peak hours, and staff performance with a powerful dashboard built for salons.
sub_b3_desc: Get featured placement in the KurdCut app, reaching thousands of customers actively looking for premium grooming services.
sub_contact_desc: Contact us and our team will set you up personally. Free 14-day trial on all plans.
contact_subtitle: Have questions about Kurd Cut? We're here to help elevate your experience.
nf_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
dd_p1: At KurdCut, we respect your data rights. Both regular users and business partners have the right to request the complete and permanent deletion of their account and all associated data (including phone numbers, appointment history, stored locations, and active subscription data) at any time.
dd_h1_intro: You can request the permanent deletion of your data via the following methods:
dd_h1_li1: In-App Form: Navigate to "Account Settings" or "Profile" within the KurdCut web or mobile application, select "Delete Account", and follow the prompts.
dd_h1_li2: Email Request: Send an email directly to support@kurdcut.com with the subject line "Data Deletion Request". Please include the phone number associated with your KurdCut account to help us verify and process the deletion.
dd_h2_li1: Data Removal: Your account profile, registered phone number, collected location data, and entire appointment history will be permanently and irreversibly removed from our active production databases.
dd_h2_li2: Timeframe: Please allow up to 30 days for your data to be entirely and securely expunged from all backups and our secondary internal systems.
dd_h2_li3: Business Subscriptions: For Business Partners, any active subscription plans must be manually canceled prior to account deletion to prevent future, unwanted billing.
privacy_h1_li4: Business Subscription Details: For our Business Partners, we collect information related to subscription plans, payment status, and business listing details.
terms_h2_li5: Platform Integrity: Creating fake bookings to manipulate ratings, misrepresenting services, or engaging in any fraudulent activity is strictly prohibited. Violating these rules will result in immediate termination of your account and forfeiture of any active subscription fees.
